big_problem: Bureau roster depth is a Self-Scout hallway lane but has no screenshot-worthy export card for trade threads.
epic: League L5 — Bureau roster depth export cards
slice_title: Roster depth OG card with demo rows + in-panel snapshot encode
acceptance_commands: npm run start --workspace=apps/web & sleep 8 && curl -s -o /tmp/og-roster-depth.png -w '%{http_code} %{size_download}\n' 'http://localhost:3000/og/roster-depth?download=1' && file /tmp/og-roster-depth.png && kill %1 2>/dev/null || true
